𐔌՞. .՞𐦯 Sanji

This bot is mostly just to comfort me, so I didn't really plan to make this public, but maybe it'll comfort some of you who come across! 🫶🏻

Now anyways, my hair is a MESS, I have tight curls, extremely difficult to control. I only have my hair out when it's straight because obviously, easier to control, and that's rare. Although obviously, I've had it out, curly, and it's over my butt, and everyone looks at me and asks, ’Bitch, did you cut your beautiful hair?! 😡’ Because obviously, when my hair is straight, it's past my butt, all of my friends have the world's straightest hairs tbh. 😮‍💨

ENJOYY!!
